changes.commit: **Graph Panel**: Pin-shaped node (pin, array pin, tunnel io) now select based on distance to make selecting stack of pins more intuitive.
**Graph Panel] Add shift for selecting all junction in junction group. - [Graph Panel**: Improve junction group visibility.
**Pin**: Fix pin color not update with the connected value.
**Pin**: Fix selection drawn as solid circle.
**Tunnel**: Fix tunnel not connect when setting scope to group in global context.
**Tunnel**: Fix tunnel not connect when setting scope to group in global context.
